reviews.comment:
Ka atención ed excelente. Se puede cargar usando la app y aprovechar los descuentos
El shopp es chico pero con una vista preciosa. El único problema es que hace horario comercial.  Abre las 24 hs para carga de combustible pero no para cafetería y compras.

(Translated by Google)
The service is excellent. You can charge using the app and take advantage of the discounts. The shop is small but has a beautiful view. The only problem is that it operates on regular business hours. It's open 24 hours for refueling but not for the cafe or shopping.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6208441069977197261/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNpcXV1RzJnRRAB
